rows.manifest_foundry_consistency_rationale: Parent 6A.11 remains a core communication gateway boundary, not a tenant-toggleable marketplace service. Child-level manifest traceability applies to subsurface_6a_outbound_gateway_enforcement because outbound gateway enforcement is a channel-facing enforcement surface that depends on service_manifest_contract; subsurface_6a_global_opt_out_registry, subsurface_6a_provider_circuit_breaker, and subsurface_6a_rate_limit_enforcement remain core primitives without direct Foundry activation.
